name: sona
description: Local-first Korean study feasibility spike workspace.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sona/domain && npm run build --workspace @sona/data && npm run build --workspace @sona/renderer && npm run build --workspace @sona/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @sona/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @sona/data && npm run typecheck --workspace @sona/renderer && npm run typecheck --workspace @sona/desktop
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build --workspace @sona/domain && npm run build --workspace @sona/data && npm run build --workspace @sona/renderer && npm run build --workspace @sona/desktop && npm run start --workspace @sona/desktop
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build && npm run package --workspace @sona/desktop && npm rebuild better-sqlite3
